name: property managers processing 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, manual report preparation causes cash flow gaps. We automate quarterly financial reporting instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to generate timely financial reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to generate timely financial reports
